instruction: Tomorrow, I'm scheduled to deliver a talk, and my PowerPoint slides and speaking notes are saved on the desktop. Help me insert my planned remarks for each slide into the "note" section of the PowerPoint as a reminder. I've completed this task for some slides; assist me in completing the remaining part.

evaluator.eval: compare_pptx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/lecture1-2021-with-ink.pptx', 'dest': 'lecture1-2021-with-ink.pptx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/multi_apps/eb303e01-261e-4972-8c07-c9b4e7a4922a/lecture1-2021-with-ink_Gold.pptx', 'dest': 'lecture1-2021-with-ink_Gold.pptx'}), examine_shape=False, examine_bullets=False)
